name: Pokémon TCG
description: Card catalog, inventory, deck building, trading, and portfolio valuation for Pokémon TCG.
author: opama

name: Card Grader
description: AI-powered card grading using OpenCV, vision models, and OCR. Estimates PSA-equivalent grade.
author: opama

name: Portfolio
description: Portfolio valuation snapshots, historical P&L tracking, and collection value charts.
author: opama

name: Storefront
description: Publish your collection for sale online. Syncs to GitHub Pages via the GitHub Contents API.
author: opama

name: AI Assistant
description: AI deck suggestions and RAG-backed chat powered by OpenAI or a local Ollama model.
author: opama

name: Showcase
description: Create public-facing showcase pages to share your favourite cards with the world.
author: opama
